ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "job" TEXT /* Type of job the customer holds */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Level of education attained by the customer */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Indicator of loan default (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the customer account */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Health insurance status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "car_loan" INTEGER /* Car loan status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  "last_contact_day" INTEGER /* Last contacted day of the month */,
  "last_contact_month" TEXT /* Last contacted month */,
  "num_of_contacts" INTEGER /* Number of contacts made */,
  "days_passed" INTEGER /* Days passed since the last contact */,
  "prev_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of previous attempts to reach the customer */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the last contact (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the customer */,
  "secondary_phone_number" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first became a customer */,
  "preferred_contact_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for contact */,
  "preferred_contact_day" TEXT /* Preferred day for contact */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_purchase_product" TEXT /* Last product purchased by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., phone, email, SMS) */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment */,
  "expected_revenue" REAL /* Expected revenue from the campaign */,
  "actual_revenue" REAL /* Actual revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the campaign */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, planned, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer being called */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign under which the call was made */,
  "call_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the call started */,
  "call_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the call ended */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the call (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "call_location" TEXT /* Location from where the call was made */,
  "call_agent_id" INTEGER /* Agent who made the call */,
  "call_transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the call */,
  "call_recording_url" TEXT /* URL of the call recording */,
  "call_notes" TEXT /* Notes made by the agent during the call */,
  "customer_response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the customer to respond to the call */,
  "call_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the call (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call log entry */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the call being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the call log entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the call */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., initial contact, follow-up) */,
  "log_agent_id" INTEGER /* Agent who created the log */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the log entry */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_logs_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the call related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Customer's comments regarding the call */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "feedback_agent_id" INTEGER /* Agent who received the feedback */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is needed (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up was provided or is scheduled */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_status" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "car_insurance" INTEGER /* Car insurance status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Health insurance status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the insurance */,
  "insurance_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the insurance */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., health, car, life) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_status_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
